name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Unsealed Satoru Gojo 👁

Recently freed from Prison Realm Satoru + established relationship

____

THIS IS A REUPLOAD because while devs changed how making a private bot public works for Trending, they didn't include the Following tab, so many of you missed the bot at first.

For the first version - I'm not deleting the bot, but I changed it to private so you can continue your old chats. If you want to start a new chat, use this version.

In tribute to the last chapter of JJK coming tonight, here's a meal for you pookies. Let's pray for our glorious Blue Eyed King's return. It's never Gojover.

LLM is done having a stroke, or at least for past few days I've been having good results (temp 1.1).

This bot has been a draft for a bit, so there might be some errors I forgot to fix. Let me know in the comments if you notice any.

Intro in public chats
